name: ODYSSEY MARINE EXPLORATION INC
summary: Odyssey Marine Exploration, Inc. discovers, validates, and develops high-value seafloor mineral resources, including phosphate and other critical minerals. The company provides specialized mineral exploration, project development, and marine services to subsidiaries, other companies, and governments. Operating for nearly 30 years, Odyssey deploys ocean technology at depths up to 6,000 meters and maintains a diversified portfolio of subsea mineral projects worldwide, advancing them through environmental permitting, resource quantification, and extraction system design.
